title: [Cavernhold, Lower Passage]
description: A maze of stalagmites prevents travel in any direction except to the southeast.  Looming above you is the steep, and quite unclimbable, wall of this narrow underground canyon.  Spanning the breach far above you is a narrow suspension bridge.

wayto.20012: ;e fput 'open door';while line = get;if ['You open the nearly invisible stone door.', 'That is already open.'].include?(line);fput 'go door';break;elsif line == 'It appears to be locked.';empty_hands;fput 'get lockpick';fput 'pick door';fput 'stow lockpick';fill_hands;fput 'open door';fput 'go door';break;end;end
